questions.question: So a serial killer who only killed bad guys? Is it okay to like them? Showtime made us like this one played by Michael C. Hall.
Introduced in 2011, what casual video game allowed players to explore, collect resources, build, craft, and fight?
What movie soundtrack with Hugh Jackman stayed at the top of the charts and was the best-selling album globally in 2018?
What Olympic gold medal winner had sex reassignment surgery?
What did "hypebeast" mean?
questions.answer: Someone who only liked things that were super popular
